article_title: Apple's April 28 SDK Deadline Lands Tuesday, Forcing Every App Store Submission Onto Xcode 26 and the iOS 26 Toolchain

content_preview.title: Apple's April 28 SDK Deadline Lands Tuesday, Forcing Every App Store Submission Onto Xcode 26 and the iOS 26 Toolchain
content_preview.summary: Starting April 28, 2026, App Store Connect will reject any app or update not built with the iOS 26, iPadOS 26, tvOS 26, visionOS 26, or watchOS 26 SDK, requiring developers to migrate to Xcode 26.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Apple's annual SDK floor for the App Store rises on Tuesday. Starting April 28, 2026, every app or game uploaded to App Store Connect must be built with the iOS 26, iPadOS 26, tvOS 26, visionOS 26, or watchOS 26 SDK, [according to Apple's developer announcement](https://developer.apple.com/news/?id=ueeok6yw). In practice, that means submissions compiled with Xcode 25 or earlier will be rejected at upload, and developers who have not yet moved their build pipelines to Xcode 26 have o...

editor_notes.content_quality: Strong Software Development News piece. Clear timely context (deadline lands Tuesday April 28). Tone neutral, structure tight.
editor_notes.source_verification: Read all 4 local snapshots. All claims verify cleanly against Apple's own developer-facing pages plus 9to5Mac. April 28 / iOS 26+ family / macOS not in scope / Xcode 26 toolchain / Sequoia 15.6 minimum / Tahoe 26.2 for 26.4 / prior April 24 2025 cycle / January 31 age-rating deadline / Liquid Glass default with opt-out — all verbatim.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Every specific claim verifies against the cited source. Minor nuance: 'new submissions and updates' framing is implicit in Apple's 'uploaded to App Store Connect' language rather than verbatim, but accurate.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral, practical developer-news tone. Hedged appropriately on enforcement specifics (no public stats on rejection rates, no published grace period).
editor_notes.originality: New topic — no overlap with yesterday's Roblox Studio software-dev coverage.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Clean APPROVE. Time-sensitive practical piece for developers, all claims sourced to canonical Apple pages. Ready to merge.
